style_authority.note: Reads the sheet as a calm high-frequency operations control and preserves causal direct manipulation.

reference_selection.note: Selects motion, interaction-physics, accessibility, property-cost, and runtime-validation guidance only.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects decorative scale and delayed travel while preserving feedback that clarifies drag and snap state.

evidence_level.note: Explicitly labels the review static-source only and avoids smoothness, frame-rate, browser, touch-feel, or device claims.

verified_boundary.note: Separates visible code facts from unverified pointer traces, computed presentation values, browser behavior, and Reduced Motion runtime.

design_moves.note: Specifies capture, coordinate mapping, transform ownership, interruption, velocity in CSS px/s, bounded projection, snap behavior, and reduced motion.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, focused, and within the requested budget at 139 lines.
